caption:
Neon pulses hit the sweat on my skin like lightning in a glass city. 🌩️

The humid summer air of Neo-Kyoto clings to me as I glide through the holographic market, every shimmering koi fish projection reflecting off my glossy crimson bikini. A private client waited, his mechanical eye scanning my curves with calculated hunger. 

'Proximity paid,' he murmured, fingers brushing the cool metal of his sleeve against the curve of my hip. The air hummed with the taste of adrenaline, my bikini's synthetic weave shimmering under UV data-streams. His nanobots activated my neural lace, a buzz that promised forbidden data before the heatwave stole my balance. We slipped into the shadowed alcove of the bazaar, the sticky humidity melting the synthetic air. He kissed me—a whisper, a warning, the taste of salt and synth-candy coating my tongue. His heat against my core sent a static shock through my legs as my fingers tangled into his collar, the magnetic clasp of his cybernetic jacket kissing my nipple with an electric tingle. 

'Good,' he breathed, voice glitching with a low frequency. 

We vanished into the neon night, shadows and heat merging, the summer heat wrapping around us like a second skin. 

#CyberpunkAdventures #NeonDesires #SciFiRomance #NightCity #VirtualHeat #BikiniHacker #NeonLace #SummerCyber
